disclaimer: AI-assisted research from public web sources — indicative, verify before quoting a client.

LUMIERE.note: 99-year leasehold from 2010, a slim 45-storey tower of 168 mostly 1- and 2-bedroom units at 2 Mistri Road within walking distance of Tanjong Pagar MRT. Trailing-12-month resales average roughly S$1,789 psf.

SELETAR PARK RESIDENCE.note: 99-year leasehold from 2011, completed 2015 by Asplenium Land (SCDA), 276 low-rise units about 200m from Greenwich V with trailing-12-month resales near S$1,337 psf. Future Cross Island Line stations Serangoon North (CR9) and Tavistock (CR10) are planned in the vicinity, though the current nearest MRT (Ang Mo Kio) is a drive away.

ONE-NORTH RESIDENCES.note: 99-year leasehold from 2005, completed 2009 by a UOL/Kheng Leong JV, 405 units directly served by one-north MRT (CC23) and set within the one-north business/R&D cluster near Buona Vista interchange. A unit reportedly transacted at a project high of S$3.95m in Aug 2025.

ICON.note: Large 99-year leasehold (from 2002) 646-unit development at 10 Gopeng Street, completed 2007, within walking distance of Tanjong Pagar MRT and near Maxwell (TE18). 2025 resales averaged about S$1,807 psf, softening toward ~S$1,725 psf in early 2026, with commentary citing a relatively high gross rental yield.

JOOL SUITES.note: Small freehold boutique block of 52 units in the Jalan Besar/Farrer Park area completed in 2014, with a rental-heavy, low-liquidity transaction profile (few resales, many leases). No verifiable en-bloc or major project news found.

THE COAST AT SENTOSA COVE.note: 99-year leasehold (from 2006) waterfront development at Sentosa Cove completed in 2009 with 249 units across three blocks. 2025-26 resale listings spanned a wide luxury range of roughly S$1,464-S$3,202 psf.

QUEENS.note: 99-year leasehold (from 1998) 722-unit condo completed in 2002, a short walk from Queenstown MRT (EW19), with trailing-12-month resales averaging about S$1,836 psf. Newer nearby supply on the same Stirling Road stretch includes Stirling Residences and Margaret Ville.

GUILLEMARD EDGE.note: Freehold development of 275 units in the Geylard/Paya Lebar area completed around 2014-2015, trading mostly as small units (e.g. a 441 sqft unit at ~S$1,801 psf in Nov 2025). No verifiable en-bloc history found.

TROPIKA EAST.note: Freehold boutique condo of 105 units in two blocks in the Eunos/Geylang area (Foo Kim Lin Road), completed in 2016. A 441 sqft unit reached about S$1,699 psf in Oct 2025.

LEONIE GARDENS.note: 99-year leasehold (completed 1993) with 138 units on Leonie Hill Road in River Valley, with redevelopment potential for roughly 380-544 units at a 2.8 plot ratio. It launched two collective-sale attempts at an S$800m reserve (May 2018 and a Jan 2019 relaunch), both of which failed to attract bids.
